programme.title: Planda go Pláta
programme.desc: Beidh Rebecca sa nGarraí Glas agus Niall sa stiúideo ag bruth rúbarb agus raidisí. (Rebecca visits An Garraí Glas and Niall is back in the studio with some rhubarb and radishes.)

programme.title: Croí na Féile
programme.desc: Tugann Hugh Carr aghaidh ar Bhéal Feirste chun obair dheonach a dhéanamh ag féile ilchultúrtha Mela. (Hugh Carr heads to Belfast to volunteer at the multicultural Mela Festival.)

programme.title: Ros na Rún
programme.desc: Tá Sonny ag ceapadh go bhfuil bealach faighte aige ar deireadh chun tarraingt siar as socrú an óstáin. (Sonny believes he's finally found a way out of the hotel deal.)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Níl cuma ná caoi fanta ar Frasier ó bhris Diane a chroí. (Frasier has not been the same since Diane dumped him in Europe.)

programme.title: Íospartaigh na Lochlannach
programme.desc: Saol an sclábhaí i ré na Lochlannach bunaithe ar chuntas pearsanta a scríobhadh san Eilvéis. (A film based on a personal account of the Slave Trade during the Viking era.)

programme.title: Fíorscéal
programme.desc: Clár faisnéise faoi mhná atá ag iarraidh a bheith ina sagairt. (This moving film tells the story of women's aspiration to enter the priesthood in the Church.)

programme.title: An Aimsir Láithreach
programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.desc: Tá Sonny ag ceapadh go bhfuil bealach faighte aige ar deireadh chun tarraingt siar as socrú an óstáin. (Sonny believes he's finally found a way out of the hotel deal.)

programme.title: Call My Agent!
programme.desc: Cé go bhfuil Andréa i gcruachás tugann sí cúnamh do Garcia le cúrsaí grá. (Her own life thrown into chaos, Andréa coaches José Garcia through a romantic predicament.)
